title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c:56 rate limit uses uint32_t uptime without overflow handling; can be bypassed after ~49 days
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:55 - confessions_post does not handle uint32_t wraparound on k_uptime_get(). Potential DoS bypass after 49.7 days. Security finding. CODEREVIEW
close_reason: Fixed uint32_t wrap in rate limit by switching to k_uptime_get_32() mimicking puck/main.c:313 and tx_queue deadline_expired. Ran 3 codereview passes (filed beads for additional findings in coap_msg.c, dtn.c, keys.c). All tests pass.
